prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年稳定在第46–58名区间，2026年位列第53名，属全国中上游水平；2026 年声誉评价偏正面；抖音热度排名第89位，评价一般，未见明显投档断档记录，整体报考关注度平稳；教育学A+为全国顶尖，心理学A-、政治学A-等学科实力突 出；物理类招生专业涵盖数学类、物理学、计算机类、电子信息类等热门方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类社会热度高热推荐，数学/统计类推荐偏热， 这些专业均为该校物理类主要招生方向，报考吸引力强；湖南省物理类考生2025年320192人增至2026年347000人（+8.4%），考生规模持续增长；华中师范大学位于湖北武汉，与湖南相邻，地域偏好较强，跨省报考热度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次19030名、2026年扩招19%对位次的 后移作用、物理类考生增长8.4%加剧竞争、计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年继续后移；预测最低位次约21155名，区间2065 5–21655名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 10742 → 11205 → 15149 → 19611 → 19030, showing a continuous backward trend, with an accelerated decline of about 4500 places in 2023–2024, and a slight stabilization in 2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is 19030; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan was 63 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 57 in 2023, 58 in 2024, and 84 in 2025; the 2026 plan expands to 100, an increase of about 19.0% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has been stable in the 46–58 range in recent years, ranking 53rd in 2026, at the upper-middle level nationally; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive; Douyin popularity ranks 89th, with average evaluation, no obvious record of admission cutoff breaks, overall application attention is stable; Education A+ is top nationally, Psychology A-, Political Science A- and other disciplines are outstanding; Physics Category enrollment majors include Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science, Electronic Information, and other popular directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended hot majors, Mathematics/Statistics are recommended as relatively hot, these are the main enrollment directions for the university's Physics Category, with strong application appeal; the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan increased from 320,192 in 2025 to 347,000 in 2026 (+8.4%), with continuous growth in examinee scale; Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, adjacent to Hunan, with strong regional preference and high cross-province application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 19030, the backward effect of the 19% enrollment expansion in 2026 on rankings, the 8.4% increase in Physics Category examinees intensifying competition, and the sustained high popularity of Computer Science/Electronic Information and other hot majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to move backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 21155, with a range of 20655–21655.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 1606 → 1408 → 1755 → 2146 → 1749, showing a fluctuating trend over the past 5 years, with a significant backward shift to 2146 in 2024 before recovering to 1749 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 700 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is 1749; the enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for History Category was 25 in 2021, 26 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 36 in 2024, and 26 in 2025; the 2026 plan expands to 35, an increase of about 34.6% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that will push rankings backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has been stable in the 46–58 range in recent years, ranking 53rd in 2026, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is relatively positive (positive events such as an 81-year-old doctoral graduate); its Douyin popularity ranking is 89th, rated as average, with no obvious records of enrollment gaps, indicating stable overall application attention; Education (A+) is at the national top level, with strong disciplines such as Chinese History (A-), Psychology (A-), Political Science (A-), and Marxist Theory (A-), which have strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher training/education majors shows differentiation and wait-and-see attitudes, while Chinese Language/Literature majors are recommended as relatively hot; the number of History Category examinees in Hunan Province increased from 142,547 in 2025 to 187,000 in 2026 (+31.2%), a significant increase in the examinee pool, sharply intensifying competition; Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, adjacent to Hunan, with strong regional preference and high cross-province application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1749, the backward shift effect of the 2026 large expansion of 34.6%, the intensified competition due to a 31.2% increase in History Category examinees in Hunan Province, and the relatively positive reputation, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will significantly shift backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2082, with a range of 1707–2457.
